LanguageData.BudFlesh_CrimsonBulb.description: A flesh-plant grown from a crimson fang seed. Once mature, it can be harvested into a Crimson Fang.
LanguageData.BudFlesh_CrimsonBulb.label: Crimson Bulb
LanguageData.BudFlesh_CrimsonFangSeed.description: A seed for growing a Crimson Bulb. Plant it on suitable living ground, then harvest the mature plant to obtain a Crimson Fang.
LanguageData.BudFlesh_CrimsonFangSeed.label: Crimson Fang Seed
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FerriteFangroot.description: A flesh-metal plant grown from a ferrite seed. Once mature, it can be harvested into a Ferrite Sting.
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FerriteFangroot.label: Ferrite Fangroot
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FerriteFangrootSeed.description: A seed for growing a Ferrite Fangroot. Plant it on suitable living ground, then harvest the mature plant to obtain a Ferrite Sting.
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FerriteFangrootSeed.label: Ferrite Seed
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FleshBlade.description: A flesh-plant grown from a blade seed. Once mature, it can be harvested into a symbiotic Flesh Blade.
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FleshBlade.label: Bud Flesh Blade
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FleshBladeSeed.description: A seed for growing a Bud Flesh Blade. Plant it on suitable living ground, then harvest the mature plant to obtain a Flesh Blade.
LanguageData.BudFlesh_FleshBladeSeed.label: Flesh Blade seed
LanguageData.FB_BiomassCocoon.description: A pulsating cocoon of biomass that holds a colonist, evolving them within.
LanguageData.FB_BiomassCocoon.label: biomass cocoon
LanguageData.FB_BurdenBlob.description: A slow hauler with a hemogel reserve. It refills at the colony heart and hardens against a wall when idle.
LanguageData.FB_BurdenBlob.label: burden blob
LanguageData.FB_BurdenBlob.tools.0.label: left pseudopod
LanguageData.FB_BurdenBlob.tools.1.label: right pseudopod
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator.description: A heavy excavation fleshbeast bred for tunnel labor. It breaks player-designated rock inside its allowed area, then returns to a colony heart to regrow worn plates through the hemogel network.
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator.label: carapace excavator
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator.tools.0.label: left shovel-claw
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator.tools.1.label: right shovel-claw
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator.tools.2.label: left digging tusk
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator.tools.3.label: right digging tusk
LanguageData.FB_CaveExit.description: A rope to climb back from flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_CaveExit.label: flesh cave exit
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback.description: A living containment beast that seals humanlike captives inside a back cocoon, feeding and sedating them through the hemogel network until release.
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback.label: cocoonback
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback.tools.0.label: crushing maw
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain.description: The colony's neural command organ. It unlocks the Flesh Architect construction tab, stores construction hemogel, and directs fleshbeast groups.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain.label: Colony Brain
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrainEmbryo.description: An immature neural organ that will grow into a colony brain.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrainEmbryo.label: Colony Brain Embryo
LanguageData.FB_ColonyEye.label: colony eye
LanguageData.FB_ColonyHeart.description: The central organ of a flesh colony. It stores hemogel, feeds nearby organs, and grows living terrain and structures.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyHeart.label: Colony Heart
LanguageData.FB_ColonyStomach.description: A living stomach that digests corpses and nutritious food into hemogel for the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyStomach.label: Colony Stomach
LanguageData.FB_ColonyStomachEmbryo.description: An immature digestive organ that will grow into a colony stomach.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyStomachEmbryo.label: Colony Stomach Embryo
LanguageData.FB_CortexMite.description: A compact bio-neural crawler that can root itself into flesh terrain, becoming a permanent organ that feeds the colony's current research project.
LanguageData.FB_CortexMite.label: cortex mite
LanguageData.FB_CortexMite.tools.0.label: mandibles
LanguageData.FB_CrimsonFang.description: A living weapon grown from a flesh-tendril wrapped around a crescent plasteel blade. Its grotesque form pulses with organic life, while crimson veins channel energy into its razor edge. The fleshy core embedded in the handle beats like a heart, strengthening the wielder’s reflexes and lending hunger to each strike.
LanguageData.FB_CrimsonFang.label: Crimson Fang
LanguageData.FB_CrimsonFang.tools.0.label: fleshy core
LanguageData.FB_CrimsonFang.tools.1.label: crimson edge
LanguageData.FB_CrimsonFang.tools.2.label: living crescent
LanguageData.FB_DefenderIncubator.description: A defensive incubator that spends hemogel to release short-lived fleshbeast defenders on command or when a hostile enters its detection radius.
LanguageData.FB_DefenderIncubator.label: Defender Incubator
LanguageData.FB_DefenderIncubatorEmbryo.description: An immature spawning organ that will grow into a defender incubator.
LanguageData.FB_DefenderIncubatorEmbryo.label: Defender Incubator Embryo
LanguageData.FB_DenseWeaver.description: A medical fleshbeast that restores missing body parts with back tendrils, then scavenges corpses to regrow spent tendrils.
LanguageData.FB_DenseWeaver.label: dense weaver
LanguageData.FB_Dreadmeld.description: A massive fused fleshbeast built for breaching rock and fighting in tunnels, still bound to the living cave that spawned it.
LanguageData.FB_Dreadmeld.label: dreadmeld
LanguageData.FB_Dreadmeld.tools.0.label: left spike
LanguageData.FB_Dreadmeld.tools.1.label: right spike
LanguageData.FB_Dreadmeld.tools.2.label: head
LanguageData.FB_EggPersonalityParasite.label: personality parasite egg
LanguageData.FB_EmbryoColonyHeart.description: An immature heart organ that will grow into a colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_EmbryoColonyHeart.label: Embryonic Colony Heart
LanguageData.FB_EmbryonicFeeder.description: An immature feeding organ that will grow into a feeder.
LanguageData.FB_EmbryonicFeeder.label: Embryonic Feeder
LanguageData.FB_EmbryonicSpitter.description: An immature acid gland that will grow into a fleshmass spitter.
LanguageData.FB_EmbryonicSpitter.label: Embryonic Spitter
LanguageData.FB_Feeder.description: An organic feeding structure that uses hemogel network power to dispense edible biomass. Any hungry colonist can draw a fresh portion from its open sides, though unaccepted pawns may dislike the meal.
LanguageData.FB_Feeder.label: Feeder
LanguageData.FB_Ferrimaw.description: A poor fighter that eats loose steel and converts it inside itself into living bioferrite metal.
LanguageData.FB_Ferrimaw.label: ferrimaw
LanguageData.FB_Ferrimaw.tools.0.label: crusher maw
LanguageData.FB_Ferrimaw.tools.1.label: left rasping limb
LanguageData.FB_Ferrimaw.tools.2.label: right rasping limb
LanguageData.FB_FerriteSting.description: A living weapon grown from a flesh-tendril wrapped around a crescent plasteel blade. Its grotesque form pulses with organic life, while crimson veins channel energy into its razor edge. The fleshy core embedded in the handle beats like a heart, strengthening the wielder’s reflexes and lending hunger to each strike.
LanguageData.FB_FerriteSting.label: Ferrite Sting
LanguageData.FB_FerriteSting.tools.0.label: fleshy core
LanguageData.FB_FerriteSting.tools.1.label: crimson edge
LanguageData.FB_FerriteSting.tools.2.label: living crescent
LanguageData.FB_FingerspikeGauntlet.description: A parasitic flesh weapon that wraps an arm and launches grown spikes.
LanguageData.FB_FingerspikeGauntlet.label: fingerspike gauntlet
LanguageData.FB_FingerspikeGauntlet.tools.0.label: spike jab
LanguageData.FB_FleshBiomass.description: A dense serving of edible colony biomass. Nutritious and safe, though deeply unsettling to anyone not bound to the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_FleshBiomass.label: flesh biomass
LanguageData.FB_FleshBlade.description: A living weapon born from a flesh-plant that entwines a plasteel blade, creating a symbiotic Flesh Blade. This grotesque yet powerful sword pulses with organic life, its plasteel edge honed by the plant's growth. Embedded with an onboard persona, it bonds with a single wielder, enhancing their combat prowess with synchronized reflexes, speed, and creative strike patterns.
LanguageData.FB_FleshBlade.label: Flesh Blade
LanguageData.FB_FleshBlade.tools.0.label: organic hilt
LanguageData.FB_FleshBlade.tools.1.label: plasteel edge
LanguageData.FB_FleshBlade.tools.2.label: living edge
LanguageData.FB_Fleshbulb.description: A bulbous mass of flesh. These fleshbeast organs store and refine nutrients for surrounding fleshmass. The chemical process generates a soft bioluminescent glow.
LanguageData.FB_Fleshbulb.label: fleshbulb
LanguageData.FB_FleshDoor.comps.2.commandDesc: Transforms this flesh door into a throbbing mass of twisted flesh.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDoor.description: A segment of living wall formed from dense flesh, this door-like structure is embedded with responsive nerve clusters. When touched, it parts to allow passage, then closes seamlessly behind, restoring structural cohesion. Though it offers little in terms of security, its integration with surrounding tissue makes it ideal for preserving the colony’s living environment.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDoor.label: flesh door
LanguageData.FB_FleshFatProtuberances.label: fat flesh protuberances
LanguageData.FB_FleshPillar.description: A living column that supports roofs without blocking movement or sight.
LanguageData.FB_FleshPillar.label: Flesh Pillar
LanguageData.FB_FleshProtuberances.label: flesh protuberances
LanguageData.FB_FleshShelter.label: Flesh Shelter
LanguageData.FB_FleshSunFlower.description: A living sun lamp that spends hemogel network power to emit crop-growing light, folding shut when inactive.
LanguageData.FB_FleshSunFlower.label: sun flower
LanguageData.FB_FleshSunFlowerEmbryo.description: An immature flower-organ that will grow into a living sun lamp.
LanguageData.FB_FleshSunFlowerEmbryo.label: Sun Flower Embryo
LanguageData.FB_FloorMawTrap.description: A living mouth hidden in the floor that snaps shut on intruders.
LanguageData.FB_FloorMawTrap.label: floor maw trap
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw.description: A field medic fleshbeast that stitches wounds, swallows loose or extracted implants, and grafts them directly into chosen colony pawns.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw.label: graftmaw
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw.tools.0.label: needle maw
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw.tools.1.label: front suturing tendril
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw.tools.2.label: paired suturing tendril
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils.description: Temporary tendrils that hold a captured creature, draw hemogel from bleeding prey, and crush dry targets until the grip withers.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils.label: Grasping Tendrils
LanguageData.FB_HemogelSac.description: A reserve organ that stores excess heart hemogel and returns it when the colony network runs low.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelSac.label: Hemogel Sac
LanguageData.FB_HemogelSacEmbryo.description: An immature reserve organ that will grow into a hemogel sac.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelSacEmbryo.label: Hemogel Sac Embryo
LanguageData.FB_LiveCocoonGrowth.description: A living wall cocoon that releases a fingerspike defender when destroyed.
LanguageData.FB_LiveCocoonGrowth.label: live cocoon growth
LanguageData.FB_MinionBroodseed.description: An immature hive seed that will grow into a minion hive.
LanguageData.FB_MinionBroodseed.label: Minion Broodseed
LanguageData.FB_MinionsHive.description: A living hive that grows sclerats for construction material delivery, simple building, and deconstruction work.
LanguageData.FB_MinionsHive.label: minions hive
LanguageData.FB_MucousDecontaminator.description: A living cleaner that spends hemogel network power to remove nearby pollution and periodically expels toxic wastepacks.
LanguageData.FB_MucousDecontaminator.label: mucous decontaminator
LanguageData.FB_Nerveclot.description: A mobile nerve node that projects a short-lived support field for nearby fleshbeasts. Its death releases a stunning pulse.
LanguageData.FB_Nerveclot.label: nerveclot
LanguageData.FB_Nerveclot.tools.0.label: gnashing maw
LanguageData.FB_Nerveclot.tools.1.label: nerve lash
LanguageData.FB_NerveCore.description: A quivering neural organ embedded within the fleshmass, this structure coordinates the infection and transformation of living beings. When approached, it lashes out with tendrils, pulling victims into brief neural fusion. Those who survive the contact are forever changed — the first step in serving the will of the colony.
LanguageData.FB_NerveCore.label: nerve core
LanguageData.FB_OrganicComponent.description: A bundle of prepared living tissue used to craft organic machinery, symbiotic gear, and flesh-grown weapons.
LanguageData.FB_OrganicComponent.label: organic component
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.description: A newborn parasite has no mind until worn by a colonist. After the host dies, it can be guided into a corpse to restore the stored mind.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.label: personality parasite
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.tools.0.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.tools.1.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.tools.2.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshleaf.description: A photosynthetic flesh organ that converts unroofed daylight into hemogel for the colony network. Partial roofing reduces output.
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshleaf.label: Photosynthetic Fleshleaf
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshleafEmbryo.descrip: An immature leaf-organ that will grow into a daylight hemogel generator.
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshleafEmbryo.label: Photosynthetic Fleshleaf Embryo
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshtree.description: A compact organ-tree fused from five fleshleaves. It produces about four leaves' worth of hemogel from daylight while occupying far less space and requiring less upkeep.
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshtree.label: Photosynthetic Fleshtree
LanguageData.FB_PitBurrow.description: A small hole to a flesh colony undercave.
LanguageData.FB_PitBurrow.label: flesh colony pit burrow
LanguageData.FB_PitBurrow.portal.enteredLetterText: Entered flesh colony undercave. Destroy structures.
LanguageData.FB_PitBurrowSpawner.label: underground emergence
LanguageData.FB_RootFleshmass.label: Root Fleshmass
LanguageData.FB_RotColonyBrain.description: A decayed remnant of a fleshmass colony brain. Its organic components have rotted away, leaving it useless.
LanguageData.FB_RotColonyBrain.label: rotten colony brain
LanguageData.FB_RotColonyHeart.description: A decayed remnant of a fleshmass colony heart. Its organic components have rotted away, leaving it useless.
LanguageData.FB_RotColonyHeart.label: rotten colony heart
LanguageData.FB_Rotlarva.description: A timid scavenger born from a dead colony organism, feeding on rotten flesh and retreating from danger instead of fighting.
LanguageData.FB_Rotlarva.label: rotlarva
LanguageData.FB_Rotlarva.tools.0.label: flesh maw
LanguageData.FB_Rotlarva.tools.1.label: body slam
LanguageData.FB_Sclerat.description: A small work-minion that delivers materials for construction and handles simple building or deconstruction tasks for the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_Sclerat.label: sclerat
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld.description: A fleshmetal scavenger that consumes mechanoid corpses, temporarily copying their weapons before the parts decay.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld.label: scrapmeld
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld.tools.0.label: head
LanguageData.FB_ScrapmeldNestling.description: An unfinished scrapmeld larva that gathers mechanoid corpses in the home area until it can rebuild itself into an adult.
LanguageData.FB_ScrapmeldNestling.label: scrapmeld seed
LanguageData.FB_ScrapmeldNestling.tools.0.label: gnashing mass
LanguageData.FB_Shardlings.description: Fragments of a divided pawn that regroup to rebuild the original body. If a shardling dies, the host is reassembled incomplete.
LanguageData.FB_Shardlings.label: shardlings
LanguageData.FB_Sinewcaller.description: A lure-hunter that targets wild animals marked with Hunt, drawing prey toward the heart whenever capture space is available.
LanguageData.FB_Sinewcaller.label: sinewcaller
LanguageData.FB_Sinewcaller.tools.0.label: jaw
LanguageData.FB_SporeCradle.description: A living worktable where colonists shape biomass and rare materials into seeds for growing organic equipment.
LanguageData.FB_SporeCradle.label: Spore-Cradle
LanguageData.FB_SporeCradleEmbryo.description: An immature work organ that will grow into a spore-cradle for crafting flesh-grown equipment seeds.
LanguageData.FB_SporeCradleEmbryo.label: Spore-Cradle Embryo
LanguageData.FB_StoneCrusher.description: A living grinder that chews stone chunks into usable blocks.
LanguageData.FB_StoneCrusher.label: Stone Crusher
LanguageData.FB_StoneCrusherEmbryo.description: An immature grinder organ that will grow into a stone crusher.
LanguageData.FB_StoneCrusherEmbryo.label: Stone Crusher Embryo
LanguageData.FB_StorageCavity.description: A living shelf that protects stored items from weather and decay, but cannot hold chunks, buildings, plants, or large corpses.
LanguageData.FB_StorageCavity.label: Storage Cavity
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHead.description: A tethered symbiotic head that bites intact heads from nearby corpses, transferring their skills to its brood womb.
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHead.label: symbio head
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHead.tools.0.label: maw
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHead.tools.1.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHead.tools.2.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_SymbioHead.tools.3.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisBroodWomb.description: A brood organ that spends skill essence and hemogel to grow fleshbeasts for the colony.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisBroodWomb.label: symbiosis brood womb
LanguageData.FB_SynapseCore.description: A research organ that cocoons a pawn under a neural membrane and converts cognition into research speed.
LanguageData.FB_SynapseCore.label: Synapse Core
LanguageData.FB_SynapseCoreEmbryo.label: Synapse Core Embryo
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurret.description: A rooted defensive organ that launches keratin spines at distant intruders and lashes close enemies with heavy tentacles.
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurret.label: Tentacle Turret
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurret.tools.0.label: north tentacle
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurret.tools.1.label: south tentacle
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurret.tools.2.label: east tentacle
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurret.tools.3.label: west tentacle
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurretEmbryo.description: An immature defensive organ that will grow into a tentacle turret.
LanguageData.FB_TentacleTurretEmbryo.label: Tentacle Turret Embryo
LanguageData.FB_Thermoregulator.description: A living heat exchanger that spends hemogel network power to regulate the temperature of enclosed rooms.
LanguageData.FB_Thermoregulator.label: Thermoregulator
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom.description: A battlefield controller that enslaves hostile humanlikes as temporary thralls. The link breaks if the controller is disabled or the victim strays too far.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom.label: thrallbloom
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom.tools.0.label: tether tendrils
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom.tools.1.label: thrashing underside
LanguageData.PitBurrowSpawner.description: Something is emerging from the ground here.
LanguageData.PitBurrowSpawner.label: underground emergence
LanguageData.PitGate.description: A massive, foreboding hole that connects the surface with a dark network of underground caves. It is possible to climb down into the caverns below.
LanguageData.PitGate.label: pit gate
LanguageData.PitGate.portal.enteredLetterText:
In the depths of the pit gate, you have discovered a massive cavern system infested with fleshbeasts.

The cavern system is clogged with masses of living flesh that block your progress. Attack the fleshmass to destroy it.

The entire cavern system seems unstable. If you find what lies behind the fleshmass, you may be able to collapse the tunnels and close the pit gate.
LanguageData.PitGateExit.label: pit gate exit
LanguageData.PitGateSpawner.building.groundSpawnerLet: The shifting terrain has fallen into the depths below, forming a massive hole.\n\nThis pit gate will remain open until you collapse its entrance. Explore the pit gate to find a way to collapse it from underneath and to find useful items in the undercaves.
LanguageData.PitGateSpawner.description: Something is emerging from the ground here.
LanguageData.PitGateSpawner.label: underground emergence
LanguageData.UnfinishedOrganicComponent.label: unfinished organic component
LanguageData.FB_FleshShelter.description: A living bed that shelters a resting pawn, feeds them through a nutrient drip, and tends bleeding wounds when assigned for medical use.
LanguageData.FB_RootFleshmass.description: A thick root mass of living flesh that anchors colony tissue and supports nearby organic growth.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyEye.description: A sensory organ grown from colony flesh. Its wet eye tracks movement around the colony and marks the area as watched by the living mass.
LanguageData.FB_EggPersonalityParasite.description: A soft, warm egg containing an immature personality parasite. If allowed to hatch, it will release a creature able to copy and carry a mind between bodies.
LanguageData.FB_FleshProtuberances.description: Dense fleshy protrusions that spread across living colony tissue. They form larger organic clumps than eye grass and can be harvested as a modest source of nutrition.
LanguageData.FB_FleshFatProtuberances.description: Swollen fleshy protrusions packed with soft nutrient tissue. They grow larger than ordinary protrusions and can be harvested for more organic matter.
LanguageData.FB_SynapseCoreEmbryo.description: An immature research organ that will grow into a synapse core.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelBlister.label: hemogel blister
LanguageData.FB_HemogelBlister.description: A pressurized hemogel blister that bursts in a spray of blood when flames approach, the organ is manually triggered, or it is destroyed.
LanguageData.FB_StumpChopped_FleshTree.description: A pulped stump left behind after a flesh tree has been felled. It still twitches around the cut and will slowly rot away if left exposed.
LanguageData.FB_StumpChopped_FleshTree.label: chopped flesh tree stump
LanguageData.FB_FleshTree.description: A towering vascular growth rooted into colony flesh. Its trunk pulses with hemogel-rich tissue, spreading shade and mass across living terrain.
LanguageData.FB_GrassEyes.description: Small watchful shoots that sprout from colony flesh in isolated clumps. They twitch faintly when something moves nearby.
LanguageData.FB_GrassEyes.label: eye grass
LanguageData.FB_StumpSmashed_FleshTree.label: smashed flesh tree stump
LanguageData.FB_FleshTree.label: flesh tree
LanguageData.FB_StumpSmashed_FleshTree.description: The ruined remains of a flesh tree, crushed into a split mound of vascular tissue.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator.label: Tissue incubator
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator.description: A living incubator that memorizes meat, leather, or whole corpses, then grows matching materials from hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawler.label: capillary trawler
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawler.description: A water filter-organ that converts nearby aquatic biomass into hemogel for the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawlerEmbryo.description: An immature filter-organ that will grow into a capillary trawler.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubatorEmbryo.description: An immature tissue organ that will grow into a tissue incubator.
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawlerEmbryo.label: capillary trawler embryo
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubatorEmbryo.label: tissue incubator embryo
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCyst.description: A compact electrocyte organ that consumes hemogel from the colony network to supply connected electrical devices.
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCyst.label: galvanic cyst
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelMaw.description: A rooted mouth that spends the colony hemogel reserve to open a permanent world-tile tunnel. Once linked, it cannot be redirected.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelMaw.label: flesh tunnel maw
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelExit.description: The distant mouth of a rooted flesh tunnel. It remains bound to the source maw and collapses if either side is destroyed.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelExit.label: flesh tunnel exit
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelOpeningMarker.description: The ground is splitting as a flesh tunnel forces its way up from below.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelOpeningMarker.label: flesh tunnel eruption
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNode.description: A nerve relay that links to the nearest colony heart, adds a grasping tendril slot, and can raise tendrils manually.
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNode.label: capture nerve node
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNodeEmbryo.description: An immature nerve relay that will grow into a capture nerve node.
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNodeEmbryo.label: capture nerve node embryo
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGland.description: A geyser-rooted organ that consumes hemogel and extrudes bioferrite from geothermal pressure.
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGland.label: geoferrite gland
